'''Ranger''' was the group designation of two [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV-1 Patrol Craft]] sent by the then [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to guard [[NL-1]], a space station constructed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]] nearby the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Argoon]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}

*<!-- 1994-07-18 -->''[[TIE Fighter: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
